0.details:
understand how the person feels
know what triggers her
know where she would like to be
tell her how important she is to us and the love we have for her
remind her the importance of winning
0.model_generation: Hey, I know you’re feeling overwhelmed and discouraged. I understand how those late nights worrying about every detail and the fear of not measuring up can shake you. I know hearing criticism or facing deadlines can bring up doubts—and that’s okay. You’ve told us how much you want to be standing confidently at the finish line, celebrating the success you’ve worked so hard to achieve. Remember, we see your dedication, we see your heart. You matter so much to all of us, and our belief in you is unwavering. Your talent, your drive, your kindness—they make us proud every day. When doubt creeps in, lean on this love—you’ve already won so many battles by staying true to yourself. Keep pushing forward, stay focused on your goals, and never forget how powerful you are. You’re destined to win, and we’ll be cheering for you every step of the way.
0.final_version: Hey, I know you’re feeling overwhelmed and discouraged. I understand how those late nights worrying about every detail and the fear of not measuring up can shake you. I know hearing criticism from people you trust can bring up doubts—and that’s okay. You’ve told us how much you want to be standing confidently at the finish line, celebrating the success you’ve worked so hard to achieve. Remember, we see your dedication, we see your heart. You matter so much to all of us, and our belief in you is unwavering. Your talent, your drive, your kindness—they make us proud every day. When doubt creeps in, lean on this love—you’ve already won so many battles by staying true to yourself. Keep pushing forward, stay focused on your goals, and never forget how powerful you are. You’re destined to win, and we’ll be cheering for you every step of the way. Never forget how important you are, you are a winner and you always be one.

1.details:
where we met
how important we are to each other
starting our own family and respecting each other
never forget where we come from
the first time we laid eyes on each other
1.model_generation: From the moment I laid eyes on you at the corner café where we first met, I knew my life was about to change. You stood there with that bright smile, and suddenly the world felt more alive and full of possibility. Today, I promise to cherish the bond we have built, to honor and respect the dreams that make you who you are. I vow to never forget where we come from—the winding streets of our hometown, the laughter shared with family, the memories that shaped us both. As we begin our own family, I promise to stand by your side with unwavering support, to listen with compassion, and to lead with kindness. I promise to celebrate your victories and lift you in times of doubt. With all that I am, I pledge my heart to you, now and always, as we write the next chapter of our adventure together.
1.final_version: From the moment I laid eyes on you at the corner café where we first met, I knew my life was about to change. You stood there with that bright smile, and suddenly the world felt more alive and full of possibility. Today, I promise to cherish the bond we have built, to honor and respect the dreams that make you who you are. I vow to never forget where we come from—the winding streets of our hometown, the laughter shared with family, the memories that shaped us both. As we begin our own family, I promise to stand by your side with unwavering support, to listen with compassion, and to lead with kindness. I promise to celebrate your victories and lift you in times of doubt. With all that I am, I pledge my heart to you, now and always, as we write the next chapter of our adventure together. Here's to more happiness, love, and lots of laughter.

2.details:
how I miss being around my friend
tell my friend that I'm a winner now. I'm doing very well at my new place
How going to the park makes me miss her even more
2.model_generation:
Hi there,

I hope you’re doing great. I’ve been thinking about you a lot lately and missing the laughter we shared when we were together. Life at my new place has been amazing—I feel like a winner these days. Work is rewarding, and I’ve settled into a fantastic neighborhood.

Every time I go to the park nearby, I can’t help but remember our long chats and afternoon strolls. The swings, the blooming flowers, even the smell of fresh grass brings back so many happy moments. How I wish you were here to enjoy it with me!

Let’s catch up soon. I’d love to hear all about what’s new in your world. Maybe we can plan a visit or a video call and fill each other in on everything.

Until then, I’m sending you big hugs across the miles.

Missing you tons,  
Your friend
2.final_version:
Hi there,

I hope you’re doing great. I’ve been thinking about you a lot lately and missing the laughter we shared when we were together. Life at my new place has been amazing—I feel like a winner these days. Work is rewarding, and I’ve settled into a fantastic neighborhood.

Every time I go to the park nearby, I can’t help but remember our long chats and afternoon strolls. The swings, the blooming flowers, and even the smell of fresh grass brings back so many happy moments. How I wish you were here to enjoy it with me!

Let’s catch up soon. I’d love to hear all about what’s new in your world. Maybe we can plan a visit or a video call and fill each other in on everything. we can even go out and enjoy our favorite ice-cream dates.

Until then, I’m sending you big hugs and kisses across the miles.

Missing you tons,  
Your friend

3.details:
admitting that I made a bid mistake
apologize for the wrong I have made
tell them I was not thinking straight
I had my own problems and used you as my scapegoat
3.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I am writing to apologize for the mistake I made. I realize now that I was not thinking straight, and instead of dealing with my own problems, I unfairly blamed you and used you as a scapegoat.

I deeply regret my actions and the pain I caused. I know an apology cannot undo what happened, but I hope it can be the first step toward making things right. You did not deserve to be treated that way, and I am truly sorry for the wrong I committed. Please know I take full responsibility for my actions and am committed to changing my behavior going forward. I understand if you need time and space to heal, and I hope one day you can forgive me. I value our relationship and will work hard to rebuild your trust. Thank you for reading this; I genuinely hope we can move forward.

Sincerely,
Your friend.
3.final_version:
Dear friend,

I am writing to apologize for the mistake I made. I realize now that I was not thinking straight, and instead of dealing with my own problems, I unfairly blamed you and used you as a scapegoat.

I deeply regret my actions and the pain I caused. I know an apology cannot undo what happened, but I hope it can be the first step toward making things right. You did not deserve to be treated that way, and I am truly sorry for the wrong I committed. Please know I take full responsibility for my actions and am committed to changing my behavior going forward. I understand if you need time and space to heal, and I hope one day you can forgive me. I value our relationship and will work hard to rebuild your trust. Thank you for reading this; I genuinely hope we can move forward, and you will find it in your heart to forgive me.

Sincerely,
Your dearest friend

4.details:
how you have always been the best person
since I have known you, I have never seen you angry
remind them about the day we will never forget where we made the best memories
4.model_generation:
Good evening, everyone. Today we gather to celebrate you, the kindest, generous soul I have ever known. Since the moment our paths crossed, you have lifted my spirits, turning ordinary days into unforgettable adventures. In all the time I’ve known you, I have never seen you angry. Instead, your laughter fills every room, and your calm strength guides us through any storm. I will never forget that perfect summer day at the lake, when we dared to jump from the old dock at sunset. We laughed until our sides ached, and in those moments, I felt alive by your side.

You make every memory a treasure and teach me what it means to love unconditionally. Today, I promise to honor the joy you bring, stand with you through every adventure, and cherish each moment as you have taught me to. Happy birthday, here’s to a lifetime of laughter together.
4.final_version: From the first day we met at college, I knew you were going to be my best friend. your smile and your laughter make you even more special. May this day bring more laughter, more blessings. May you get all your heart desires. You are a very special soul, and I feel so lucky to have a friend like you. I remember the day we decided to go to the salon and do our hair, and the stylist made us the worst hairstyles we ever saw, but instead of being angry, we laughed our lungs out, and that memory stayed with us forever. I know I can be difficult to deal with sometimes, but thank you for forever holding my hand and never letting go. Your parents gave me a present in you, and I will forever be thankful to them. I now have a friend, a sister, and a colleague. stay blessed.

5.details:
thanking a friend
thank her for being with me when I lost my parents
she became more than a friend to me but I also a sister
that things makes me smile when I think of our friendship
5.model_generation:
Dear Emily,

Thank you from the bottom of my heart for standing by my side when I lost my parents. Your unwavering support during those darkest days gave me more strength than I ever imagined. You’ve become so much more than a friend—you’re the sister I always longed for. Your comforting words, gentle hugs and tireless presence made the unbearable moments feel a little less lonely.

I often think back to our late nights talking until dawn, quiet walks in the park, and laughter that turned my tears into smiles. Each memory reminds me how lucky I am to have you in my life. Your love and compassion have shaped me in ways I can’t fully express.

Thank you for being my rock, my confidante and my sister. I cherish our friendship more than words can say.

With all my love,
5.final_version: I don't know where to start when I talk about you. I would like to start by thanking you for choosing me as your friend. You came into my life when it was very dark, and I didn't know that there was any hope left for me. I lost my parents, and you came in and gave me a shoulder to cry on. You showed that you are a real friend, and you brought back my smile. Now I have found love again because you told me that I'm worth it. I know you are to be blessed with everything you ever wanted in life. Your family and kids are very lucky to have a mother and a sister like you. Thank you for being you and being the best for me. I will love you, pray for you, fight your battle still the better end. I always root for you.

post_survey.feedback: It was very challenging yet educative
